title: My Socks Don't Match
lyrics:
[verse]
One sock is red
One sock is blue
One is too big
One is brand new

[chorus]
My socks don't match
I don't care
My socks don't match
I'll wear this pair

[verse]
One has some dots
One has a stripe
One has a hole
But it's all right

[chorus]
My socks don't match
I don't care
My socks don't match
I'll wear this pair

[verse]
Mom says go change
I say no way
My feet are glad
Just like this today

[chorus]
My socks don't match
I don't care
My socks don't match
I'll wear this pair
style_prompt: Super bouncy children's song, ukulele and hand claps, strong bass pop on every beat, 120 BPM, off-beat emphasis ba-BOP ba-BOP, groove in your knees, toddler bounces involuntarily, simple infectious impossible to sit still
cover_description: A small happy child sitting on the floor putting on mismatched socks, one red with polka dots one blue with stripes, a pile of colorful socks scattered around, bright cheerful bedroom, morning sunlight
